professional_summary: Joseph Rodriguez is a Senior BI Engineer in Manila with 7+ years across business intelligence, data analysis, RPA, and full-stack development. He specializes in Tableau and Power BI migrations, dashboard optimization, SQL, PowerApps, automation, and translating complex data into actionable insights.

experience.work: Migrates and optimizes Tableau and Power BI reports; develops interactive dashboards and PowerApps solutions; leads legacy-system modernization and mentors junior analysts.
Led and mentored BI analysts, migrated home-grown reports to enterprise workflows, collaborated with data engineering, optimized data processes, and established reporting practices.
Delivered Tableau and Power BI solutions through requirements analysis and dashboard development.
Designed and implemented Tableau dashboards, automated SQL view creation, and supported daily BI work.
Designed REST API architecture with Java Spring Boot, built internal applications with Golang and C++, and developed an MVC web application.
Created interactive dashboards and RPA solutions that streamlined telecom operations.
Built symmetric-encryption software for securely sharing multiple file types and created Oracle and Python data-processing scripts.

honors: 1st place in the Philippine National Programming Challenge
1st and 2nd place in T.I.P. programming competitions
2nd place in the Philippine National Programming Challenge
Philippine Programming Rating 1, where 1 is highest

projects.name: SephAnimeList
projects.description: A Power BI anime dashboard using MyAnimeList API data, ratings, recommendations, trends, and custom Deneb visuals.

projects.name: PH Flood Control Corruption Watch
projects.description: A Power BI project combining Deneb, AI, and live news.

projects.name: Forrest Gump: A Data Story
projects.description: A narrative Tableau story about running distance, box office performance, and life events.
